channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists make stunning discovery that could change our understanding of the Universe
item.description: Scientists may have uncovered a surprising secret behind why life exists at all. A new study suggests that the Universe’s fundamental constants — the ...

item.title: The Universe’s biggest black holes may be forged in violent mergers
item.description: The Universe’s biggest black holes may not be born giants after all. Scientists analyzing gravitational-wave signals from dozens of black hole collisi...

item.title: Interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS contains strange water never seen in our solar system
item.description: A mysterious comet from beyond our solar system is giving astronomers a rare glimpse into alien worlds — and it may have formed in a place far colder ...

item.title: A common constipation drug shows surprising power to protect kidneys
item.description: A common constipation drug may have unexpectedly unlocked a new way to slow chronic kidney disease — a condition that affects millions and often leads...
